title: hebe gibbsii
intro: Hebe gibbsii, also known as the 'Purple King', is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hebe gibbsii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function, while its herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and tinctures. In New Zealand, Hebe gibbsii is also used topically to treat skin conditions, wounds, and minor injuries.
